notes: Core subject. Essay argues SOA enables modular decomposition of monolithic applications into reusable services; delivers flexibility, reusability, and interoperability. Already in cache from enterprise-integration-perspective-d21c1b.

Core subject alongside SOA. Essay argues BPM provides tools and methodologies for modeling, analyzing, and improving processes continuously; delivers efficiency, real-time monitoring, and business-goal alignment. Identified as complementary to SOA.
Subject of renewal strategy. Characterized as: monolithic, inflexible, high-maintenance-cost, poor user experience. Essay argues these are the primary target for SOA+BPM renewal.
Implied output of SOA+BPM integration; reusable services assembled into new composite solutions. Already in cache.
Named as an emerging technology that a flexible SOA architecture enables organizations to adopt more readily; cited in the future-proofing section.
